description: Inspector panel scrolls independently when content overflows, without moving the canvas
Palette panel scrolls independently without jumping over the app header
Canvas remains fully visible when either side panel is scrolled to the bottom
isPaletteFloating state and fixed-top positioning are removed
Grid column picker renders 5 visual preset options when layout mode is grid
Layout controls render for selected section nodes, including the grid column picker
Grid column picker remains visible when layout mode is flex so users can switch into grid
Clicking '2 equal columns' sets gridTemplateColumns to '1fr 1fr'
Clicking 'sidebar + main' sets gridTemplateColumns to '1fr 2fr'
Clicking 'main + sidebar' sets gridTemplateColumns to '2fr 1fr'
Clicking '3 equal columns' sets gridTemplateColumns to '1fr 1fr 1fr'
Clicking '1 column' sets gridTemplateColumns to '1fr'
Clicking a grid preset from flex mode switches layout.display to 'grid' and applies the preset columns
Active preset highlighted based on current gridTemplateColumns value
No preset highlighted when gridTemplateColumns is a custom value
Raw CSS input for gridTemplateColumns visible below the picker
Gap stepper: renders numeric input + unit dropdown instead of text input
Padding stepper: renders numeric input + unit dropdown
Unit dropdown shows px, %, rem options
Stepper parses '16px' into value=16, unit='px'
Stepper parses '2rem' into value=2, unit='rem'
Stepper parses '50%' into value=50, unit='%'
Stepper parses '0' or '0px' into value=0, unit='px'
Stepper writes back combined string when value changes
Stepper writes back combined string when unit changes
Margin renders 4 stepper fields (top, right, bottom, left)
Margin link-all toggle: when linked, changing one value updates all four
Margin link-all toggle: when unlinked, values are independent
Margin parses '8px 16px' shorthand correctly
Margin parses '8px' single-value shorthand (all sides equal)
Margin parses '8px 16px 24px 32px' full shorthand
Margin writes back optimized shorthand
New preset 'Notes + Totals Row' creates a 2-col grid section
New preset 'Two Equal Columns' creates a 2-col grid section
New preset 'Three Info Columns' creates a 3-col grid section
New presets use layout.display:'grid' and gridTemplateColumns
New preset 'Recurring + One-time Tables' creates two dynamic tables bound to recurringItems and onetimeItems
recurringItems collection filters to items where is_recurring === true
onetimeItems collection filters to items where is_recurring !== true
serviceItems collection filters to items where service_item_kind === 'service'
productItems collection filters to items where service_item_kind === 'product'
Empty filtered collection returns empty array, not error
recurringSubtotal sums total_price of recurring items only
recurringTax sums tax_amount of recurring items only
recurringTotal equals recurringSubtotal + recurringTax
onetimeSubtotal sums total_price of one-time items only
onetimeTax sums tax_amount of one-time items only
onetimeTotal equals onetimeSubtotal + onetimeTax
serviceSubtotal/serviceTax/serviceTotal computed from service items
productSubtotal/productTax/productTotal computed from product items
QuoteViewModel includes filtered item arrays
QuoteViewModel includes per-group aggregate number fields
mapLoadedQuoteToViewModel populates filtered arrays correctly
mapLoadedQuoteToViewModel computes aggregates matching sum of filtered items
Aggregate values are 0 when no items match the filter (not NaN or undefined)
Table editor collection dropdown includes recurringItems, onetimeItems, serviceItems, productItems
Fields palette shows new quote aggregate bindings for discovery
New inspector controls render correctly in dark theme
Existing standard invoice template renders identically after changes
Existing standard quote templates render identically after changes
